Saturn is with Jupiter=Guru Karma and in the 7th there is Venus.
Mercury, Moon and Mars are in the 9th from Saturn and Jupiter
are in the Capricorn which is the south sign. virgo is also South
Sign. Therefore SATURN+JUPITER+MERCURY+MOON

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 79
+MARS aspected by Venus.SATURN (KARMA), JUPITER=
Guide, aspected by Venus (the lady), Venus is in the sign of
Mother, thus indicating Motherhood of the Lady.
But Moon is Womb. Mercury is the child.
MARS+MOON+MERCURY is the child in the womb ..
